patch.value: Daily Release publish step runs prepublishOnly post-tag: align npm publish with --ignore-scripts

Fleet alignment after pm-ts-starter run 27448995157 and pm-web runs 27447490522/27448994089 failed at npm publish: without --ignore-scripts, prepublishOnly re-runs changelog:check AFTER the release tag exists, where pm-changelog suppresses the pending-version window and renders the zero-padded tag heading (e.g. 2026.06.13 != 2026.6.13) — the check can never pass post-tag (tracked upstream as unbraind/pm-changelog#41). Siblings pm-csv/pm-beads/pm-todos/pm-gantt-chart/pm-graph/pm-linear/pm-slack-standup already publish with --ignore-scripts; the full validation suite still runs pre-tag in the dedicated Run release checks step.
Daily Release with fresh closed pm items publishes to npm without the post-tag changelog:check failure
Aligned with siblings; YAML validated; full checks still run pre-tag in Run release checks
